column1: Hey Andrew, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What up Spiffy. Our break is from March 8-15
Cool bro I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Punta Cana. Not 100% certain on destination but I just want to throw some options in front of my friends.
bet that. I'll send a few. y'all would def like punta tho. That's where I'll be too
How many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid. you all from the same school?
Oh dope we have a few groups from your campus rollin with us this year
y'all def know how to party fs lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
Still gotta get everyone locked in i just want some quotes
yea I feel you. I'll send what we have rn just keep in mind things change daily
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Bet sounds good. You can send it to andrewcosta2452@gmail.com
just sent that over lmk if it came through. added the cyber week deal in there too
I got it but the dates r messed up, can you check for the 8th-13th? And can we also see one with flights included?
apologies on that brotha, pricing the same either way tho
flights we can do, its typically cheaper to get those separately on your own though
which airport do we want to fly out of? ill take a look
Ok gotcha im looking rn but your def right it'll be cheaper if we just do it separately
thats punta ^ sending cancun in a sec
yerr Andrew whats good bro, how we feelin about the options so far?
What's up spiffy im trying to put something together rn to show my friends w all the flight possibilities and prices depending on which days we go
I like the options so far tho for Punta Cana
Just to clarify, price will be the same regardless of which dates we pick that week?
Yup exactly. We can do any arrangement of days. The 5 night is standard, and 4 night is standard. Regardless what day we start
What are you looking at for flights? I can help you look too
Just trying to find the cheapest flights from CLT - PUJ. Would be fine w a connection as long as it's not 10+ hrs or independent airport transfer
Liked “Yup exactly. We can do any arrangement of days. The 5 night is standard, and 4 night is standard. Regardless what day we start”
We're not set on any specific date just trying to see when's the cheapest to fly since the package is set
Word bro I'll do a scan rn
This American airlines flight is pretty golden bro. non stop both ways. March 7-12, $597 https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/c5fZchwkYEh8Wy8t6
Would get it from american airlines directly
Or if you want to do 4 nights, March 7-11, heres one for the same price same flight https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/2sbMXq6PfNcQTma48
Bet thats what I found too not gonna get any better than that
Yea would def lock that in its a steal in my opinion
I've seen flights on different days that were more expensive and had 8 hr layover
Word yea we def dont want that lol
Andrew brotha whats good, did we wanna secure that punta cana option?

What's up spiffy my bad been a busy ass couple of days we started our finals today. Im trying to get everyone on board and committed but w everything we got going on it's been difficult. Should have everyone ready to secure by the end of the week.
Ahh man good luck with finals. kill that
lets link back up in a couple days when you all set with that. dont want you distracted
Liked “lets link back up in a couple days when you all set with that. dont want you distracted”
yerr Whats good brodie hope finals went smooth, hows things lookin for break?
My bad spiffy my last one was yesterday surprisingly. Gonna try to rally all the troops this weekend
all good bro hope they went smoothly! and bet yea lmk and i can get you a reservation set up, lock this thing down
yoo whats good brodie, just checkin in hows things lookin so far?
Andrew brotha whats good, hows the squad feelin?

What's up spiffy these mfs are pissing me off but one more guy just said hes 100% in. As of right now myself and 5 others are good to go trying to get these last 2 on board but it may only be 6 of us now.
Yo! okay bet all good. I can set things up for you 6 for now and then the last 2 if they wanna be added on within the week we can get them locked in
Let me double check flights again I think 7-12th was cheaper but I'll let you know in one sec
Liked “Yo! okay bet all good. I can set things up for you 6 for now and then the last 2 if they wanna be added on within the week we can get them locked in”
Word will set that up rn
just emailed over the reservation. 6 slots in there for now so the core group can get situated
actually bro just checking, was it the Occidental Punta Cana you wanted to do, or the Riu Republica?
I'll be at the Occidental Punta Cana
Okay word yea thats what I made it for
Im gonna send it over to them all now
Bet lmk if any one needs help getting on
I just saw it says 2 rooms and I tried to press the $899 option w 2 in each room but it hasn't changed so the portal is just for 2 rooms
yo! my b for the delayed response was in a meeting
do you want all 2 person rooms? ill adjust that rn
just updated that to all 2 person rooms
Andrew brotha whats good, how we lookin with things?
yoyo Andrew whats the word brotha were you still lookin to lock this in
my dog! did you still need this reservation or not anymore
Yeah my bad I will make sure to get everyone to make the deposit before the new year
aight, I gotta adjust things on it. still the same amount of ppl?
One of the 6 is still on the fence but I just told him I have to know today so I'll let you know as soon as he gets back to me
He might go on another trip to visit his family
word well just lmk whats up with the rest of the group

Alright so the 6th guy who was on the fence said he still can't commit. I can have everyone else get their deposit in before the 1st. I assume with 5 ppl instead of 6 we'll need to have 3 in the first room and 2 in the second room right? And if the 6th guy comes around in a week or so and says he's in would we be able to add him?
yo my bad missed this but yea we'd do a room of 3 and room of 2, and if you find a 6th person we can slot them in
Alright sounds good let me know when the portal is updated and I'll let everyone know to make the deposit
Andrew checkin in bro, how things lookin?
Looking good gonna make sure everyone pays by tmrw
yoo Happy New Year bro, and aight bet
Happy new year bro hope you had a good one
When I go into the portal I can't find the option to make payment. It just says reserved in the blue bubble but when I click on it nothing happens
Yea you'll want to log in first, there's a icon at the top that looks like a profile icon
You'll want to click there and log in and then it'll take you to your portal
Ok bet im driving home from Vermont rn but will do it on my laptop when I get home
yoyo were you able to get that situated
Yeah I just did my bad I was shot yesterday and forgot when I got home
Lmk if anyone else in the group needs help
whats good bro! just need you and william to get settled with the final payment so we can move your reservation into the pre-departure process
I just sent mine in I'll remind him
yoyo is everyone else in the group on the same flight as you?
Yo what's up yeah we're all on the same flight
Do they need to update their flight info too
I'll add it in I got tou
yoyo! just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Bet thank you, I'll let you know if we have any questions. I think we're gonna hold off on the tickets for now and see what we want to do when we get there.
okay bet bro! yea text me if you need anything. if not I'll see y'all when you get to the resort
safe travels today my dog. see y'all out here
